title: Bubble Render Workaround
description: Changes bubble behavior to not render under certain conditions
body:
it doesn't do much, but it *does* remove the air bubbles when you have water breathing, any effect with "Gills" in its name (actually translation key), or any origin from [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) which has the "You can breathe on water, but not land" buff/debuff

In theory, it *should* work with just about any Minecraft version, but only 1.18.2 is tested.
